jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Quikr
jsonLd.description:
Join the Quikr family as a Frontend Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Quikr:
Quikr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quikr!
